title: This Order Block Setup Changed Everything
description: Master order blocks with these 3 game-changing tips. Stop losing trades and start reading institutional levels like a pro. Follow for more ICT trading secrets!
script: This order block setup paid for my car. Here's the secret. Tip 1: Only trade fresh order blocks. Never touched. Tip 2: Wait for displacement. Price must break structure aggressively. Tip 3: Enter on mitigation. Price returns to block. Follow R2F Trading for more setups. Drop a fire emoji!
